ai_chat.title: Ask our AI anything
ai_chat.suggestions_title: Suggestions on what to ask Our AI
ai_chat.suggestion_1: What can I ask you to do?
ai_chat.suggestion_2: Where is the nearest museum to me?
ai_chat.error_message: Something went wrong. Please check that Ollama is running and try again.

responses.capabilities:
Great question! You can ask for my help with the following:

1. Anything to do with museums in Egypt e.g. Where is the Grand Egyptian Museum?

2. Information about tickets, prices, and opening hours

3. Directions and locations of museums

4. Recommendations for museums to visit

5. Information about Egyptian artifacts and history
responses.nearest_museum:
The nearest museum to you is the Egyptian Museum in Tahrir Square, Cairo. It's approximately 1.5 km away.

Location: El-Tahrir Square
Hours: 9 AM - 7 PM
Ticket: 150 LE

Would you like directions or more information about this museum?
responses.grand_egyptian:
The Grand Egyptian Museum (GEM) is located on the Cairo-Alexandria Desert Road, near the Giza Pyramids.

Opening Hours: 9 AM - 5 PM
Ticket Price: 200 LE

It's the largest archaeological museum in the world dedicated to Egyptian civilization, featuring over 100,000 artifacts including the complete Tutankhamun collection!
responses.egyptian:
The Egyptian Museum is located in Tahrir Square, Cairo.

Opening Hours: 9 AM - 7 PM
Ticket Price: 150 LE

It houses an extensive collection of ancient Egyptian antiquities with over 120,000 items. Don't miss the Royal Mummy Room!
responses.islamic_art:
The Museum of Islamic Art is located on Port Said Street, Cairo.

Opening Hours: 9 AM - 5 PM
Ticket Price: 100 LE

It's one of the world's greatest museums with rare Islamic artifacts spanning 1,400 years from various Islamic civilizations.
responses.tickets:
Here are the ticket prices for major museums:

Grand Egyptian Museum: 200 LE
Egyptian Museum: 150 LE
Museum of Islamic Art: 100 LE
Coptic Museum: 120 LE

You can book tickets directly through our app! Would you like me to help you with that?
responses.hours:
Museum Opening Hours:

Grand Egyptian Museum: 9 AM - 5 PM
Egyptian Museum: 9 AM - 7 PM
Museum of Islamic Art: 9 AM - 5 PM
Coptic Museum: 9 AM - 4 PM

Most museums are closed on public holidays. Would you like to book a visit?
responses.recommendations:
Based on visitor reviews, I recommend:

#1: Grand Egyptian Museum - Perfect for first-time visitors!
#2: Egyptian Museum - Rich history and iconic artifacts
#3: Museum of Islamic Art - Beautiful architecture

What interests you most: Ancient Egypt, Islamic culture, or both?
responses.souvenirs:
Our app has a Souvenir Marketplace where you can browse and purchase authentic Egyptian souvenirs:

Keychains and jewelry
Pottery and artifact replicas
Traditional crafts

You can access it from the home screen. Would you like me to show you popular items?
responses.map:
You can view all museum locations on our interactive map!

Tap the 'Map' button on the home screen to:
- See all museums near you
- Get directions
- View museum details

Would you like specific directions to any museum?
responses.greeting:
Hello! Welcome to Anubis - your guide to Egyptian museums and culture!

I'm here to help you discover amazing museums, book tickets, find souvenirs, and answer any questions about Egyptian history.

What would you like to explore today?
responses.thanks: You're very welcome! Feel free to ask me anything else about museums, tickets, or Egyptian culture. Happy exploring!
responses.default:
I'm here to help you with information about Egyptian museums, tickets, locations, and more!

You can ask me about:
- Museum locations and hours
- Ticket prices
- Recommendations
- Directions
- Souvenirs

What would you like to know?

one.title: Explore Museums Like Never Before
one.description: Step into history and discover artifacts, stories, and hidden treasures with Anubis.

two.title: Bring Artifacts Back to Life
two.description: Use AR to scan mysterious statues, artifacts, revealing their original beauty and history.

three.title: Explore and Discover
three.description: Navigate museums with interactive maps, find nearby cafés and shops, and connect with Egyptian points.
